record_types.name: CLOCK_LFCLK_Cluster

fields.name: SRC
fields.description: Indicates that LFCLKSTART task was triggered

fields.name: RUN
fields.description:
Copy of LFCLK.SRCCOPY register, set when LFCLKSTARTED event is
triggered.

fields.name: STAT
fields.description: Copy of LFCLK.SRC register, set when LFCLKSTART task is triggered

record_types.name: CLOCK_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_XOSTOP
fields.description:
Start PLL and keep it running, regardless of the automatic clock
requests

fields.name: TASKS_PLLSTOP
fields.description: Start LFCLK source as selected in LFCLK.SRC

fields.name: EVENTS_LFCLKSTARTED
fields.description: Calibration of LFRC oscillator complete event

fields.name: EVENTS_DONE
fields.description:
HFXO tuning is done. XOTUNED is generated after TASKS_XOSTART or
after TASKS_XOTUNE has completed

fields.name: EVENTS_XOTUNED
fields.description: HFXO quality issue detected, XOTUNE is needed

fields.name: EVENTS_XOTUNEERROR
fields.description: HFXO tuning could not be completed

record_types.name: CLOCK_PLL_Cluster

fields.name: RUN
fields.description: Which PLL settings were selected when triggering START task

record_types.name: CLOCK_XO_Cluster
EVENTS_DONE_Register
EVENTS_LFCLKSTARTED_Register
EVENTS_PLLSTARTED_Register
EVENTS_XOSTARTED_Register
EVENTS_XOTUNED_Register
EVENTS_XOTUNEERROR_Register
EVENTS_XOTUNEFAILED_Register
INTEN_Register

fields.name: XOSTARTED
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event PLLSTARTED

fields.name: PLLSTARTED
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event LFCLKSTARTED

fields.name: LFCLKSTARTED
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event DONE

fields.name: DONE
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event XOTUNED

fields.name: XOTUNED
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event XOTUNEERROR

fields.name: XOTUNEERROR
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event XOTUNEFAILED

record_types.name: INTENCLR_Register

fields.name: XOSTARTED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event PLLSTARTED

fields.name: PLLSTARTED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event LFCLKSTARTED

fields.name: LFCLKSTARTED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event DONE

fields.name: DONE
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event XOTUNED

fields.name: XOTUNED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event XOTUNEERROR

fields.name: XOTUNEERROR
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event XOTUNEFAILED

record_types.name: INTENSET_Register

fields.name: XOSTARTED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event PLLSTARTED

fields.name: PLLSTARTED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event LFCLKSTARTED

fields.name: LFCLKSTARTED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event DONE

fields.name: DONE
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event XOTUNED

fields.name: XOTUNED
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event XOTUNEERROR

fields.name: XOTUNEERROR
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event XOTUNEFAILED

record_types.name: INTPEND_Register

fields.name: XOSTARTED
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event PLLSTARTED

fields.name: PLLSTARTED
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event LFCLKSTARTED

fields.name: LFCLKSTARTED
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event DONE

fields.name: DONE
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event XOTUNED

fields.name: XOTUNED
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event XOTUNEERROR

fields.name: XOTUNEERROR
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event XOTUNEFAILED

record_types.name: RUN_LFCLK_Register
RUN_PLL_Register
RUN_XO_Register

fields.name: Reserved_5_15
fields.description: Read-only. LFCLK state (Running between START task and STOPPED event)

fields.name: Reserved_0_15
fields.description: Read-only. PLL state (Running between START task and STOPPED event)

record_types.name: STAT_XO_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_15
fields.description: Read-only. XO state (Running between START task and STOPPED event)

variables.name: GLOBAL_CLOCK_NS_Periph
variables.code:
GLOBAL_CLOCK_NS_Periph : aliased CLOCK_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => GLOBAL_CLOCK_NS_Base;

variables.name: GLOBAL_CLOCK_S_Periph
